use_cases: Landing page hero sections with engaging visual animations
Feature showcases displaying product imagery or brand assets
Portfolio or gallery presentations with continuous scroll effects
Visual storytelling sections that capture user attention
Decorative banners that highlight imagery while maintaining CTA focus
ai_summary: A hero CTA component featuring dual-row infinite marquee animations with abstract decorative images. The component includes a Marquee sub-component with configurable speed, pause-on-hover, and reverse options. Designed to capture attention and drive conversions through dynamic continuous scrolling visual presentation with Unsplash imagery.
